creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

Due to the lack of free time I have to drop the maintainership of my ports.

kbirthday itself seems to be dead: There was no activity since 2004.

Best regards,


Heiner

Fix: --Boundary-00=_PwtAMqNJqM3tjZP
Content-Type: text/x-diff;
  charset="iso 8859-15";
  name="Makefile.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment;
	filename="Makefile.diff"



--Boundary-00=_PwtAMqNJqM3tjZP----e7z1M35NFnYq4Ef0NtCXfy2aYS5piwu87KA3BsRti30e1Cyv
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig	2010-05-30 23:23:54.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2010-05-30 23:25:42.000000000 +0200
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.gfai.de/~jaham/download/ \
 		http://freshmeat.net/redir/kbirthday/32531/url_tgz/
 
-MAINTAINER=	h.eichmann@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	KDE kicker-applet that reminds you of birthdays and anniversaries
 
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:22
